title: Communauté de communes de l'Auxillois
summary: The Communauté de communes de l'Auxillois is a former communauté de communes in the Pas-de-Calais département and in the Nord-Pas-de-Calais région of France. It was created in January 1999. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes du Ternois in January 2017.
text:
The Communauté de communes de l'Auxillois is a former communauté de communes in the Pas-de-Calais département and in the Nord-Pas-de-Calais région of France. It was created in January 1999. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes du Ternois in January 2017.

Composition
The Communauté de communes comprised the following communes:
